cycles.observation: The first fixture suite failed because source-governance docs were required but not yet created.
cycles.learning: Validation must require the explanatory source contract, not only JSON registries.
cycles.change: Added primary-source technical pack, standalone skill and operator documentation.
cycles.verification: Claim validator and focused tests passed.

cycles.observation: The pagination fixture did not represent a true page-two-to-page-one canonical relationship.
cycles.learning: Adversarial fixtures must encode the exact defect rather than merely resemble it.
cycles.change: Changed the fixture to /?page=2 canonicalizing to the root.
cycles.verification: The pagination finding was produced and asserted.

cycles.observation: The first capability overlay rewrite would have removed current priority-package loading behavior.
cycles.learning: New source governance must augment, not replace, mature capability resolution.
cycles.change: Rebased the overlay on the current resolver and preserved package metadata and package_count.
cycles.verification: Overlay regression test checks package preservation and shared knowledge loading.

cycles.observation: The existing procedure validator assumed one monolithic procedure file.
cycles.learning: A new flagship skill needs a non-duplicative procedure extension without editing the canonical catalog into another rulebook.
cycles.change: Added product-proof-procedures.md and cross-file uniqueness validation.
cycles.verification: Canonical skill consistency checks 85 indexed skills and one heading per skill.

cycles.signal: The source plan identified three material tactics outside the flagship crawl path.
cycles.learning: They can be implemented safely as operator-supplied evidence analyzers without pretending to have live access.
cycles.optimization: Added AI timeout, citation opportunity, and review compliance services with limitations and CLI commands.

cycles.signal: Client reporting was documented but not executable.
cycles.learning: Reporting frameworks become product capability only when target timing and modeled value are preserved in data.
cycles.optimization: Added GOOD/BETTER/BEST performance narrative analyzer with separated evidence layers.
